Description: Typing a keyword and pressing Enter opens the search results page with results
Steps: 1. Click search icon in header 2. Type a valid keyword 3. Press Enter
Expected Result: Search results page loads; product cards visible; no broken layout.

Description: Clicking a product suggestion in autocomplete navigates to that product's PDP
Preconditions: Search input open; autocomplete suggestions appear
Steps: 1. Type partial keyword 2. Wait for autocomplete suggestions 3. Click a product suggestion
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path; PDP loads correctly.

Description: Clicking a product card on the search results page navigates to the product's PDP
Preconditions: Search results page loaded with products
Steps: 1. Search valid keyword 2. Click first product card (image or name)
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path; PDP loads correctly.

Description: Clicking the search button submits keyword search and loads results page
Steps: 1. Type keyword 2. Click search submit button
Expected Result: Search results page opens; results match keyword.

Description: Search icon or input is visible in the header
Steps: 1. Open homepage 2. Inspect header
Expected Result: Search entry point (icon or input field) is visible and interactable.

Description: Autocomplete suggestions appear after typing a keyword
Steps: 1. Click search icon 2. Type partial keyword (≥2 chars)
Expected Result: Autocomplete suggestion panel appears with at least one suggestion.

Description: Autocomplete product suggestion shows product name and image
Steps: 1. Type keyword 2. Inspect product suggestions in autocomplete
Expected Result: Product name visible and non-empty; product image visible and not broken.

Description: No-results state is shown for a non-matching keyword
Steps: 1. Type non-matching/nonsense keyword 2. Press Enter or click search
Expected Result: No-results message visible; no unrelated products shown; page does not break.

Description: Search result products are relevant to the searched keyword
Steps: 1. Search valid keyword (e.g. 'sneakers') 2. Inspect product names in results
Expected Result: Product names contain or relate to searched keyword; no obviously unrelated products.

Description: Applying a filter on the search results page narrows the product list
Preconditions: Search result page loaded; filter options available
Steps: 1. Search valid keyword 2. Apply one filter (e.g. a colour or size)
Expected Result: Product list updates to match keyword + filter; result count decreases or stays equal.

Description: Sorting search results by price reorders products
Preconditions: Search result page loaded; sort controls visible
Steps: 1. Search valid keyword 2. Select Price: Low to High
Expected Result: Products reorder with lowest-priced item first.

Description: Mobile search panel opens and search returns results
Steps: 1. Tap search icon 2. Type keyword 3. Press Enter or submit
Expected Result: Mobile search panel opens; search results page loads with product cards.

Description: Search input does not execute injected script (XSS safety)
Steps: 1. Enter a script tag as search keyword (e.g. <script>alert(1)</script>) 2. Submit
Expected Result: Script is not executed; page remains stable; result or no-result state shown safely.
Notes: Verifies safe output encoding; not a penetration test

Description: Clicking a category suggestion in autocomplete navigates to the correct PLP
Preconditions: Category suggestions enabled; category matching keyword exists
Steps: 1. Type keyword matching a category (e.g. 'sneakers') 2. Click a category suggestion
Expected Result: URL changes to a PLP/category path; PLP loads with relevant products.

Description: Search result page URL contains the searched keyword as a query parameter
Steps: 1. Search keyword 2. Inspect URL
Expected Result: URL contains ?q= or similar param with the searched keyword encoded.

Description: Searched keyword or result heading is displayed on the results page
Steps: 1. Search keyword 2. Inspect page heading or result title area
Expected Result: Heading or title area shows the searched term or result count text.

Description: Load More / next page loads additional search results without duplicates
Preconditions: Search result has more products than first page
Steps: 1. Search broad keyword 2. Click Load More or next page
Expected Result: Additional product cards appear; no duplicates; count increases.

Description: Autocomplete panel closes after selecting a suggestion
Steps: 1. Type keyword 2. Click any suggestion
Expected Result: Suggestion panel is no longer visible; user navigated to result or PDP.

Description: Empty search submission does not crash the page or navigate unexpectedly
Steps: 1. Clear search input 2. Submit (press Enter or click search button)
Expected Result: Page remains stable; user stays on current page or default search behavior follows design.

Description: Search submission fires a dataLayer search event
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Submit search keyword 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /search|search_submitted/i captured.
Notes: Partial — event fires verified; payload schema not validated

Description: Skechers search result product cards render after JS hydration (SPA)
Steps: 1. Search valid keyword on Skechers site 2. Wait for product cards to render (poll on card selector)
Expected Result: At least one product card visible after hydration; not stuck in loading state; no timeout.
Notes: Skechers is a pure SPA — search result cards NOT available at domcontentloaded; requires waitForFunction polling same as PL-skx-001
